ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: INCLUDES(Competitor_Product__c,"Other") && ISBLANK(Other_Competitors__c) && $Profile.Name<>"System Administrator" && RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Wolves" && RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Rank_Ranger"&& RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Acquired_Company"&& MEDPIC_Next_Stage__c = false
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please provide details on other compitetors.
